report:
Implemented agent API key isolation per plan. PR #30 created: https://github.com/Duongntd/strawberry/pull/30

Changes in mcps/agent-manager/server.py (launch_agent): reads ANTHROPIC_API_KEY from agents/<name>/.claude/settings.local.json, writes to secrets/.agent-key-<name> (chmod 600), and prepends `export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=$(cat ...)` to the launch command — same scrollback-safe pattern as GH_TOKEN.
